fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

seo.title: Wyoming Physical Therapist License Reciprocity - How to Transfer Your License (2026)
seo.description: Already licensed as a physical therapist? Here's whether your license transfers to Wyoming - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.
seo.keywords: physical therapist license reciprocity wyoming, how to transfer physical therapist license to wyoming, physical therapist compact wyoming, wyoming physical therapist endorsement application

license_types.title: PT, DPT
license_types.description: The standard credential to practice as a physical therapist in Wyoming.

steps.title: Create Account and Apply Online
steps.description: Register as a 'First time applicant' and complete the online application via the Wyoming Online Licensing System. Pay the initial application fee of $200.

steps.title: Submit Official Transcripts
steps.description: Arrange for official transcripts from your physical therapy educational program to be sent directly from the institution to the Wyoming Board of Physical Therapy.

steps.title: Complete Criminal Background Check
steps.description: Follow the instructions provided by the Board to complete fingerprinting and a criminal background check through the Wyoming Division of Criminal Investigation (DCI). A separate fee applies for the DCI check.

steps.title: Pass Wyoming Jurisprudence Exam
steps.description: Complete and pass the Wyoming Jurisprudence Examination, which is typically administered online through the Wyoming Online Licensing System or a link provided within the application.

steps.title: Verify Prior Licenses & NPTE Scores
steps.description: If applying by endorsement, arrange for verification of all professional licenses held (current or expired) to be sent directly from other state boards. Also, ensure your NPTE scores are sent to the Wyoming Board, either directly from FSBPT or through prior license verification.

documents.detail: Sent directly from your educational institution.
Official verification of passing the NPTE (National Physical Therapy Examination).

provisional_text: Many states offer a limited permit or provisional license for new graduates waiting to take the NPTE. Check specific board rules for supervisory requirements.
reciprocity_text: Physical Therapists licensed in another state can often apply via endorsement by providing license verification and current certification.

faqs.question: How much does a Wyoming physical therapist license cost?
faqs.answer: The initial application and licensing fee varies, often around $100 to $200. Check the specific fee breakdown above.

faqs.question: Is national certification required?
faqs.answer: Yes, passing the NPTE (National Physical Therapy Examination) is a standard requirement for initial licensure across almost all states.

faqs.question: Does Wyoming have reciprocity for physical therapists?
faqs.answer: Yes. Wyoming participates in the PT Compact. If your home state and license qualify for compact privilege, you can typically practice in Wyoming without a separate endorsement application.

faqs.question: How long does it take to transfer my physical therapist license to Wyoming?
faqs.answer: Most endorsement applications take 4 to 6 Weeks. If you qualify for an active compact privilege, there may be no separate wait to start practicing.

faqs.question: Can I start working in Wyoming while my endorsement application is processing?
faqs.answer: A temporary or provisional credential is available while the full endorsement application is pending.

reciprocity.notes: Physical Therapists licensed in another state can often apply via endorsement by providing license verification and current certification.

hero.title: Become a Physical Therapist in Wyoming
hero.dek: To apply for a Physical Therapist license in Wyoming, use the Wyoming Online Licensing System to create an account and submit your application.

official_links.registration_steps: Navigate to the Wyoming Online Licensing System login page, click 'First time applicants, please register here' to create an account, then follow the prompts to complete the online application.
